title: The Attic
description:
You pass by the attic. You hear a knock.
Aside from the floorboards creaking under your feet. It's silent in here.

What's there by the window?

There is a carved circle in the window sill.
And a tiny glass ball in the middle of it.
It's blue, clean from dust.
Charming, like a little piece of sky that fell.
...Or was it offered?

Who leaves marbles by the attics' window?
Are you truly alone in this house?
Find out the origins of little treasures left on the windowsill. Feed your obsessive paranoia or befriend...some kind of creature?

Enter the Attic.

The Attic is a Visual Novel and Walking Simulator style game with multiple endings.
You, the main character, live alone in this old house. When one day you hear a knock in your attic. While entering it you find little blue marble at the windowsill.
The outcome of this story is up to you.
Do you find the whole ordeal of blue marbles at the attic whimsical?...or threatening?

This game is a love letter to the classical horror stories about old haunted houses, basements and ofcourse attics. Psychological horror inspired by author's experience with OCD-like symptoms and intrusive thoughts.
description_short: Visual Novel and Walking Simulator style game with multiple endings. A love letter to the classical horror stories about old haunted houses, basements and ofcourse attics. Psychological horror inspired by author's experience with OCD-like symptoms and intrusive thoughts.
